chunks.title: Construction of the Ark and Mercy Seat
chunks.reason: Describes the making of the ark and mercy seat as a continuous narrative unit.

chunks.title: Construction of the Table and Utensils
chunks.reason: Details the creation of the table for showbread and its associated vessels.

chunks.title: Construction of the Lampstand
chunks.reason: Narrates the crafting of the golden lampstand and its components.

chunks.title: Construction of the Incense Altar
chunks.reason: Records the building of the altar of incense and its carrying poles.

chunks.title: Preparation of Oil and Incense
chunks.reason: Lists the final items prepared by Bezalel for the tabernacle service.
